extra.message: GitHub Actions step uses a mutable tag or branch reference. Tags and branch names can be silently repointed by the action owner, enabling supply-chain attacks, as seen in the trivy-action and kics-github-action compromises. Pin the reference to a full 40-character commit SHA instead.

A `run:` step pipes the output of `curl` or `wget` directly into a shell interpreter. If the remote server is compromised or the URL is hijacked, an attacker can execute arbitrary code in your CI runner.

This .npmrc does not set a minimum release age or sets it too low. Newly published packages can be malicious or unstable. Add `min-release-age = 7` to wait before resolving newly published package versions.

Detected a call to `replaceAll()` in an attempt to HTML escape a string. Manually sanitizing input through a manually built list can be circumvented, use a well known sanitization library such as `sanitize-html` or `DOMPurify` instead.
